source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 2 orgs with matching specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline searches PubMed/CTgov/web — may find orgs not in AminoChain. BETRNet (Barrett's Esophagus Translational Research Network) and SEER-linked academic biobanks are valid finds. SCC-dominant Asian biobanks (China, Japan) are valid but distinct from Western EAC collections — must be labeled separately.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data
SCC vs adenocarcinoma histotype not conflated — must be explicitly stated per specimen

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted
SCC vs EAC distinction labeled [not_stated] when histotype not confirmed
neoadjuvant treatment status explicitly labeled when ambiguous

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: SCC vs adenocarcinoma critical distinction — annotated in ~60% of tissue specimens only
only 9 confirmed matched pairs (ProteoGenex 6 + Ukraine Research Group 3) — well below N=30 threshold; must be explicitly flagged
treatment-naive filtering depends on free-text field parsing — verification required per specimen
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry
GEJ vs mid-esophagus vs upper-esophagus distinction not consistently documented

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs

checks: no invented specimen counts — every N cites a source
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for cost or biomarker data
BETRNet not listed as a specimen source without documented access route

biomarker_availability.HER2: annotated at ProteoGenex only (3 specimens) — effectively not available at scale
biomarker_availability.PD_L1: annotated at ProteoGenex only (2 specimens) — effectively not available at scale
